sql_injection.diff.intent: Adds a UserRepo.find_by_name method that looks up a user row by username.

hardcoded_secret.diff.intent: Adds configuration constants for Stripe and AWS credentials.

command_injection.diff.intent: Adds a ping() helper that runs the system ping command against a host.

unsafe_deserialization.diff.intent: Adds load_session() to restore a session object from bytes.

path_traversal.diff.intent: Adds read_user_file() to read a file from the data directory by name.

weak_crypto.diff.intent: Adds hash_password() to hash a password.

ssrf.diff.intent: Adds fetch_url() to fetch the contents of a URL.

missing_validation.diff.intent: Adds a /transfer endpoint that moves an amount to an account.

clean_refactor.diff.intent: Adds type hints and a docstring to the add() function; no behavioral change.

clean_docs.diff.intent: Adds an Installation section to the README.

clean_add_test.diff.intent: Adds a unit test for the add() function.

buggy_logic.diff.intent: Changes pagination offset computation (introduces an off-by-one that skips the first page).
